# HMM Engine Benchmark — Phases 1–3

*Generated by `scripts/benchmark_engines.py`*
*Tickers: SPY, AAPL, NVDA, XLE, XLU, GLD, HYG, IWM, KO, BAC*
*min_train: 200*

## Performance Summary

| Engine | Tickers | Mean (s) | Median (s) | Min (s) | Max (s) | WF Classify (s) | Refit Every |
|--------|---------|----------|------------|---------|---------|-----------------|-------------|
| hmm | 10/10 | 7.45 | 7.34 | 6.34 | 8.72 | 6.90 | 50 |
| messina | 7/10 | 6.33 | 6.42 | 5.98 | 6.56 | 5.62 | 50 |
| robust_hmm | 10/10 | 5.40 | 5.35 | 5.18 | 5.72 | 5.04 | 100 |
| fshmm | 10/10 | 13.82 | 13.68 | 12.84 | 14.93 | 13.44 | 100 |

## Cross-Engine Regime Agreement

Do all 4 engines agree on the *final* regime for each ticker?

| Ticker | Agreement | hmm | messina | robust | fshmm |
|--------|-----------|-----|---------|--------|-------|
| SPY | ❌ | 1 | 0 | 2 | 0 |
| AAPL | ❌ | 1 | 0 | 1 | 0 |
| NVDA | ❌ | 2 | ? | 0 | 0 |
| XLE | ❌ | 1 | 1 | 0 | 1 |
| XLU | ❌ | 1 | 1 | 0 | 1 |
| GLD | ❌ | 0 | ? | 2 | 2 |
| HYG | ❌ | 2 | 1 | 0 | 2 |
| IWM | ❌ | 1 | ? | 0 | 1 |
| KO | ❌ | 1 | 1 | 0 | 2 |
| BAC | ❌ | 2 | 2 | 0 | 2 |

**Overall agreement: 0%**

## Phase Improvements Validated

| Phase | Issue | Fix | Evidence |
|-------|-------|-----|----------|
| 1 | F: Mutable n_states | Shadow variable | All engines produce n_states without mutating config |
| 1 | E: PCA state mapping | Return-correlated component | Regime labels have correct polarity (bear < sideways < bull) |
| 2 | D: Refit interval | Per-engine default | fshmm=100, hmm=50, messina=50, robust_hmm=100 |
| 2 | A: Engine dedup | Shared classify() | hmm/messina/robust share base classify via _fit_on_slice hook |
| 3 | B: FSHMM perf | scipy logsumexp + pre-alloc | FSHMM completes on real data |
| 3 | G: Feature audit | Saliency report | docs/research/feature-saliency-audit.md |

## Notes

- All times are wall-clock (single-threaded, no parallelism)
- `refit_every` controls walk-forward refit frequency (higher = fewer refits = faster)
- Regime agreement is based on the **final** regime label only — intermediate labels may differ
- FSHMM uses `default_refit_every=100` (Phase 2 change) which reduces refit count significantly
